Yidhari Murphy

This one took so long to make... Unfortunately I had to trim a LOT of 2.3's story to make it fit. But don't worry, the general outline is all there. Yuzuha, Alice and Manato are also mentioned in the bot but Lucia is also present, of course. But she isn't as fleshed out. Just her involvement in the 2.3 story is what's available. I'll update it with Lucia's personality included once I also make a bot of hers. Fingers crossed, this bot isn't trash.
